note_on_methodology: Evaluation is keyword-based against pre-registered ground truth. A response is marked correct if ≥40% of key tokens from the ground truth correct_element + correct_action appear in the response (minimum 2 tokens). Full responses are in full_log.json for manual review. Token counts for RUN A include image encoding estimate (170 tokens/512px tile + 85 base). This is NOT an OSWorld-style task completion benchmark — it measures element identification accuracy from screenshots, not end-to-end agent task success.
